title: helichrysum italicum
intro: Helichrysum italicum, also known as the Italian strawflower or immortelle, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region and parts of southern Europe, characterized by its small, yellow or white flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and other health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum italicum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, as well as having potential anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Helichrysum italicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, tinctures, teas, and capsules, which are often used in aromatherapy, skincare, and natural medicine.
